summary: Add placeholder Audio and MCPs entries to the rust-diffforge authenticated workspace rail below Agents, Files, and Vault.

review_items.summary: The authenticated desktop rail adds Audio and MCPs navigation entries after Vault and before Settings.
The Audio rail item opens a non-functional placeholder surface without claiming audio device or recording behavior exists.
The MCPs rail item opens a non-functional placeholder surface without claiming MCP server management behavior exists.
The MCPs placeholder must render without local registry state or undefined app-level dependencies so selecting the tab cannot blank the workspace.
No database schema, migration, SQL policy, or data access change is required.

patches.summary: Add Audio and MCPs rail buttons and route them to placeholder workspace surfaces.

compatibility.notes: The change is limited to authenticated desktop UI navigation and placeholder rendering.
